platform.name: Cortex OS
platform.note: Cloudflare Pages deploys from right-idea-creative/cortex on push to main (automatic deployments, no Direct Uploads in deployment history) — the repo IS the source of truth, verified 2026-06-17 (session 8). The repo's ad-spend-pacing.html reads the n8n webhook and uses cortex-shell.js. An earlier 2026-06-01 note here described the frontend as uploaded outside the repo with a stale repo copy; that was checked and does not hold (see ARCHITECTURE.md + STATE.md corrections, P-TECH-09 closed).

ad_spend_pacing.refresh: live (browser fetches webhook on load, no cache)

raw_budget.purpose: External tables on the source Sheets

notes.pacing_api: The view the webhook serves. committed_budget_live FULL OUTER JOIN actual_spend_all + enrichment + spent_mtd + day-of-month dims.
notes.committed: ORPHANED. Reads old committed_budget_seed (no Yelp, stale). NOT used by pacing_api. See PENDING P-TECH-01.
notes.actual_spend_mtd: Fixed 2026-06-01 to include all channels (was Google-only). Session 8 (2026-06-17): now 3 CTEs incl a nextdoor CTE reading nextdoor_spend_daily (Sheet branch excludes Nextdoor), mirroring actual_spend_all. Duplicated channel union with actual_spend_all is tech debt (PENDING P-TECH-12).
notes.nextdoor_spend_daily: Nextdoor spend/performance from the Ads API. Partitioned by report_date, clustered by advertiser_id. Written daily by Cloud Run Job cortex-nextdoor-ingest via MERGE on (advertiser_id, report_date). ADR-010.
notes.actual_spend_all: Three CTEs: google_ads UNION other_channels_live (excl Nextdoor) UNION nextdoor_spend_daily; joined to client_crosswalk on customer_id (Nextdoor matches advertiser_id=customer_id).

reference.note: Source of AM mappings; pacing reads client_crosswalk, not this directly.

transformed.purpose: LEGACY pacing views, superseded by budget dataset, not in live path
transformed.status: deprecated, left in place, not maintained

committed_budget_live_refresh.action: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE budget.committed_budget_live AS SELECT ... FROM raw_budget.committed_budget_long

other_channels_live_refresh.action: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE budget.other_channels_live AS SELECT ... FROM raw_budget.other_channels_normalized

cortex-nextdoor-ingest.action: Loops /me advertisers -> synchronous /stats per advertiser/day -> MERGE into budget.nextdoor_spend_daily. ADR-010.

cortex-nextdoor-daily.action: POSTs to the Run Jobs API to execute cortex-nextdoor-ingest

nextdoor-ads-token.purpose: Nextdoor Ads API v3 bearer token for cortex-nextdoor-ingest

used_for: Nextdoor Ads API -> BigQuery ingestion (Cloud Run Job)

other_channel_spend.name: Other Channel Spend
other_channel_spend.used_in: other-channel actual spend (Bing/LSA/Meta). Nextdoor migrated to API (ADR-010); Sheet Nextdoor rows now dead (P-OPS-08).

n8n.note: pacing_data_webhook (workflow 'ODC Pacing — Data API', id y6Y8uzQ9lntdFiLp) runs SELECT p.* FROM budget.pacing_api p LEFT JOIN reference.client_mapping m ON LOWER(TRIM(p.client))=LOWER(TRIM(m.client_name)) (alias monday_item_id AS mondayClientId). Uses p.* (not an explicit column list) so it inherits new pacing_api columns; an explicit list previously dropped spent_mtd and showed $0 on the dashboard (LEARNINGS L-019). Live data source for the pacing dashboard. To test: Publish then curl the production URL — the webhook trigger does not auto-fire on editor Execute workflow.
n8n.pacing_workflow_nodes: Pacing Data Request (webhook GET) -> Query pacing_api (BigQuery executeQuery) -> Respond With Rows
n8n.pacing_workflow_administered_by: cortex (Sebas) as of 2026-06-17 session 8; was previously treated as Nate's black box

nate_rutledge.note: Also operates under digital@rightideacreative.net for some BigQuery work.

data_freshness_expectations.nextdoor: daily (Nextdoor Ads API via Cloud Run Job cortex-nextdoor-ingest)
data_freshness_expectations.yelp: committed only, no actual feed yet (see PENDING P-OPS-01)
